$comment: v2 — the bare `tamable` flag graduates into a full `tame` block (VILLAGER-AND-GODHEAD-SPEC Part III, Beasts at Heel). $comment allowed throughout for first-guess numbers invented beyond the spec.

tame.description: this creature is tameable (Part III, Beasts at Heel) — the WILD ladder gates it, Ghal sweetens it, beast_system.gd runs it

tier.description: WILD talent tier that unlocks taming this species (3/6/9 -> small/pack-hunter/apex)

cravedFoodItemId.description: item-* the species eats to build trust

meals.description: trust meals needed at Ghal rank 0 (tuning/beasts.json discounts per rank, floored at minMeals)

behavior.description: heel-slot AI parameters, same shape as arms-class.schema.json's behavior block — role decides which other keys apply

engageRange.description: fighter only: meters at which the beast engages aggro

breakHpPct.description: fighter only: HP fraction at which it breaks and runs to the owner

carrySlots.description: porter only: extra inventory slots granted at heel

instincts.description: exactly the 3/6/9 ignition trio, same rhythm as arms-class talents

namePool.description: deterministic-draw names offered at taming (numbered-pool rename at the kennel, no free text at EA)

keepsakeItemId.description: item-* dropped on beast_death; Ghal's altar craves it
